West Africa

Ghana Travel Guide

Best for diaspora journeys, first-time West Africa travel, and routes that combine history with beaches and rainforest.

Destination guide to Ghana

Ghana is one of West Africa’s easiest entry points, combining strong hospitality, heritage travel, Atlantic coast sites, and a vibrant contemporary cultural scene.

Getting around

Accra is the main hub, with road connections to Cape Coast, Kakum, and northern parks.

Best time to visit

November to March is usually the easiest dry-season window, with December especially busy for cultural events and diaspora travel.

Planning notes

Use this guide to compare what the country does best, how its main attractions connect, where stays and restaurants fit into the route, and which details to verify before committing to a booking.

Dining

Dining ideas that add flavor to the journey

Image slot Restaurant Oasis Beach Resort Restaurant

Cape Coast & Kakum

Oasis Beach Resort Restaurant

Cape Coast dining is casual and practical. Oasis works as a traveler-friendly stop after castle touring or before a Kakum day.

★ 4.2 (274) $$
